commit.message:
make the reading of URL encoding issues easier to read

The existing documentation when rendered was hard to read for a as the entire string was in a pre and rendered in the same font.  Coupled with the fact the the first URL would contain a space this made it hard to scan as you had no visual clues and had to backtrack to re-read what the sentence was trying to say.

Switch to using inline definition using {@code} and swapped the order so that the string without spaces came first negating any need for back tracking when scanning
